question.label: Stopped pushing
question.name: What made you stop pushing on mentoring?
question.description: Drills into the stalled mentoring thread to surface whether the blocker is time, clarity, or follow-through.

answer: I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.

assessment.note: Uncertainty about next-quarter ownership is a strong clarity gap that is stalling mentoring momentum and creating unease.

new_queue.label: Next quarter ownership
new_queue.name: What feels most unclear about what you'll own next quarter?

new_queue.label: Support ask
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to keep the next two weeks moving cleanly?

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, what’s the first thing you want to tighten up before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
